programmes.show_description: Susan Warne. When seemingly healthy John Proctor was found dead at home, police were stumped. But, a woman in his family was hiding a dark secret that lead to his death. S1, Ep1
Sabah Khan. A love triangle between two sisters and one of their husbands led to a shocking murder. Detectives look back at the case that proved love can ruin any family bond. S1, Ep2
Mr. Big. In 2010, 36-year-old barman Dexter Bain was brutally killed during a failed robbery. Detectives use CCTV footage and stage a sting operation to prove who pulled the trigger. S9, Ep1
The Devil's Bathtub. In 2016, father of seven, Craig Rideout, is reported missing after a strange home intrusion. Using surveillance footage, police unravel an unbelievable plot. S9, Ep2

Teleshopping.
Predators and Parasites. A makeshift coffin conceals a body - can insects help cops identify the corpse? Plus, a parasite expert proves murder when a woman is found in a dumpster. S6, Ep15
Stranger Than Fiction. When homicide investigators meet crime writers, it transpires that real-life stories are often stranger than fiction. S6, Ep16
Death of a Diplomat. The dignity of Embassy Row is shattered as a bomb strapped to the undercarriage of a Chevelle kills a former Chilean ambassador to the US and his wife. S7, Ep7
Deadly Payout. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep8
Carol Taggart/Melanie Smith. A neighbourhood dispute leads to devastation for an entire family. Plus, a woman in her mid-fifties disappears. S4, Ep4
Married with Secrets. It is love at first sight for Michelle and Dennis. But soon, the dark past of Michelle's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide. S2, Ep3
Lost In Her Secrets. After becoming estranged from her friends, Sheena Gibbs decides to return home to Chicago. But somewhere between home and Iowa, she mysteriously disappears. S11, Ep4
Last Look Of Summer. A young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill. Detectives turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's attempt to cover his tracks. S3, Ep2
Jesse Matthew. An ex-footballer abducted, raped and murdered two university students five years apart. What were the steps that led to these sinister murders? S1, Ep3
Twice Shy. Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like the perfect couple. But behind the veneer of happiness in home movies lie dark secrets - and an unlikely killer. S4, Ep7
Double Cross. In a small town, the lives of two couples are unravelled by a series of betrayals, deceit and violence. How did a love affair result in a crime of passion? S4, Ep8
So Close To Home. Two years after Ali Lowizter vanishes, police receive a tip that she may have been trafficked. The search turns into a rescue mission but will it bring Ali home? S9, Ep10
Laura Davies And Acid Attack. Judge Rinder examines the case of 21-year-old Laura Davies, who was murdered by her partner when she wanted to end their relationship. S1, Ep1
All That It Seems. A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, kills a young mother. Police use construction work cameras to piece together her final moments. S6, Ep9
Seychelles: A Body In The Park. When the body of a Royal Navy sailor was found in a park in the Seychelles, his parents believed something sinister happened to him the night he died. S1, Ep5
James Fairweather. 15-year-old James Fairweather terrorised a local community with random deadly attacks that left two people dead. What made him carry out such brutal murders? S1, Ep3
Carol Taggart/Melanie Smith. A neighbourhood dispute leads to devastation for an entire family. Plus, a woman in her mid-fifties disappears. S4, Ep4
Hannegret Donnelly. Christopher Donnelly was found battered with 78 visible injuries in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire. His wife, Hannegret, had been abusing him at home for years. S1, Ep3
Singh. A classic love triangle that lasted 16 years led to a shocking murder by Lakhvir Singh in 2009. Her method of killing gave her the nickname 'The Curry Killer'. S1, Ep4
Prison Break. An escaped inmate brutally murders a respected correctional administrator at her home outside the prison in Tennessee. It sets police on a frantic manhunt. S9, Ep3
A Crash, Not An Accident. In 2017, the discovery of a mortally wounded man and a car riddled with bullets leads Pasco detectives on a trail of CCTV to track down a killer. S9, Ep4

In the Camera's Eye. A look at when there are no eye-witnesses to murder, photographic evidence can provide investigators with a permanent record of the killer. S6, Ep17
Partners in Crime. Investigates partners who commit crimes, including two cab drivers, and a new DNA technique that can extract clues from four-year-old evidence. S4, Ep2
Operation Seaload. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep9

Brothers Betrayed. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep11
Laura Davies And Acid Attack. Judge Rinder examines the case of 21-year-old Laura Davies, who was murdered by her partner when she wanted to end their relationship. S1, Ep1
Lone Star Lust. A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown. S2, Ep4
Lost In Paradise. Alex Gumm, a musician interested in philosophy and all things extra-terrestrial, vanishes in Hawaii. Alex's childhood friends risk their lives to find answers. S11, Ep8
Murder At Sunrise. In 2009, Philip Gattuso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo. When police can't find any leads, they turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video. S3, Ep6
Thomas Infante. Thomas and Lisa Infante had four children and a volatile marriage. One day Lisa announced she'd met someone else and an argument spiralled out of control. S1, Ep8
Alabama Murder Mystery. When Frank Hilley is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the town of Anniston grieves. But suspicions arise after his daughter also falls seriously ill. S2, Ep2
The Last Broadcast. After taping their TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible car accident. Only one survives. Do tapes offer a clue to what happened? S2, Ep4
Last Words. 19-year-old Logan Schiendelman vanishes after a night out. When authorities find no evidence of foul play, they are forced to examine his family's controversial past. S9, Ep2
Victor Nealon And Cash Robberies. Judge Rinder examines the wrongful conviction of Victor Nealon, who was found guilty of attempted rape and sentenced to life imprisonment. S1, Ep2
Come Home Carlie. 11-year-old Carlie disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Detectives uncover disturbing footage of a mysterious man grabbing her. S7, Ep1
City Under Fire. The East Coast experiences the first major terrorist attack since 9/11 - the FBI races against time to track down the bomber and save thousands. S2, Ep2
Full Throttle. Bicyclists cope with road-raging drivers. A man records a tense moment in a New Jersey parking lot. An angry driver phones a man who cut him off. S2, Ep9
Angry Asphalts. Motorists fend off brake-checking buffoons. A family defends themselves from a knife-wielding man. Two women get heated in a hospital parking lot. S2, Ep10
